package_name: User-facing package with ADR and fix loop

content.statement: A user-facing dashboard change must show delivery-unit status and blockers consistently across implementation, validation, and release.
success_criteria: Users can inspect status and blockers after release.
Fix loops preserve traceability to the same delivery unit.
constraints: The implementation must preserve typed-link traceability.
Validation and release evidence must stay repository-linked.

content.summary: Define the user-facing contract for showing delivery-unit lifecycle, blockers, and post-validation fix state.
functional_requirements: Timeline must show canonical delivery-unit status.
Blocked state must show explicit blocker reason.
Fix loop must remain attached to the same delivery unit.
non_functional_requirements: Status updates must be deterministic and auditable.
state_transitions: Ready for Implementation -> In Implementation -> In Review -> Ready for Integration Testing -> In Integration Testing -> Waiting for Fix -> Ready for Implementation -> Ready for Acceptance -> Accepted -> Ready for Release -> Released -> Done

artifacts.title: Use canonical delivery-unit event stream as status source

content.context: The dashboard needs one authoritative status source across UI, validation, and release evidence.
content.decision: Project the canonical delivery-unit event stream into the UI instead of deriving state from ad hoc task comments.
alternatives: Derive status from PR labels only
consequences: UI and validation depend on the same canonical status history.
Architecture support is required for event-source contract changes.

content.purpose: Deliver a user-facing status timeline backed by canonical delivery-unit state.
content.scope: UI timeline, typed status mapping, blocker rendering, fix-loop rendering, and release completion.
content.architecture_decision_rationale: A cross-contour authoritative event source is required for consistent state projection.
definition_of_ready: Requirement, specification, and ADR are approved.
Contour and execution-task decomposition is complete.
definition_of_done: Fix-loop evidence remains linked to DU-101.
acceptance_criteria: A user can inspect current status, blocker reason, and recovered fix-loop outcome from one timeline.

content.responsibility: Implement the UI timeline and fix-loop state rendering.
definition_of_ready: FE task has approved upstream artifacts.
definition_of_done: All FE execution tasks for DU-101 are merged and validated.

content.responsibility: Provide the canonical event projection consumed by the timeline.
definition_of_ready: BE task has approved upstream artifacts.
definition_of_done: All BE execution tasks for DU-101 are merged and validated.

content.responsibility: Expose status events and blocker/fix metadata for DU-101.
definition_of_done: Backend endpoint is merged with validation evidence.

content.responsibility: Render canonical status timeline and blocker details.
readiness_criteria: Backend event endpoint contract is available.

artifacts.title: Fix timeline recovery after integration defect

content.responsibility: Correct timeline rendering for post-fix recovery after integration validation.
readiness_criteria: Integration testing identified a linked defect for DU-101.
definition_of_done: Fix PR is merged and DU-101 returns to acceptance flow.
